title: Abigail (2024) - Box Office and Financial Information
text: Abigail (2024) box office information: The film made $10.2 million domestically during its opening weekend, finishing second behind Civil War. Internationally the film made just over $5 million in its opening weekend across 62 markets on over 7000 screens. The film's total worldwide opening was $15.2 million. In its second weekend, the film dropped 49.5% with $5.2 million domestically. The film ultimately grossed $25.9 million in the United States and Canada and $17.1 million in other territories, for a worldwide total of $43 million. The film was made on an estimated budget of $28 million. With marketing and distribution costs factored in, the film needs approximately $56-70 million worldwide to break even, making its performance below break-even. The film cost $28 million to produce and earned strong critical reviews with an 83% on Rotten Tomatoes, but failed to achieve the box office success that was projected.
